# get_usage { #socialinfrascorepy.get_usage }

```python
get_usage(client, start_date=None, end_date=None)
```

Get usage summary for a date range.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type     | Description                                                                                              | Default    |
|------------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client     | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client` authenticated with :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.sign_in`. | _required_ |
| start_date | str      | Start date in ``YYYY-MM-DD`` format.                                                                     | `None`     |
| end_date   | str      | End date in ``YYYY-MM-DD`` format.                                                                       | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description                               |
|--------|------------------|-------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | Usage metrics from ``fn_get_user_usage``. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> usage = si.get_usage(authed, start_date="2025-01-01")
```
